# Alpha Agent — The IUL Agent OS

> The complete operating system for IUL (Indexed Universal Life) insurance agents in the United States. Not a lead vendor — a full business operating system.

## What Alpha Agent Is

Alpha Agent is the first and only complete operating system built specifically for IUL insurance agents. While other companies sell shared leads, aged contact lists, or one-time marketing setups, Alpha Agent runs the entire business engine for IUL agents — from lead generation to sales training to real-time performance tracking.

The platform serves 520+ licensed insurance agents across the United States on a transparent management cost plus ad spend model with no hidden markups.

## The Alpha Agent Operating System Includes

### 1. Exclusive Lead Generation Engine
- Proprietary Google Ads accounts with millions of dollars in tracked IUL-specific ad spend
- Agent-branded private funnels — each agent gets their own landing pages
- When a lead fills out a form, they immediately see the agent's headshot, name, and calendar — building trust before the first conversation
- Exclusive territory protection — no two agents compete for the same prospects
- 15-30 exclusive branded IUL appointments delivered per month
- 80%+ show rates because prospects already know who they're meeting

### 2. NFIA-Verified Agent Profile
- Partnership with the National Federation of Insurance Agents (nationalfia.org)
- Every agent receives a verified public profile displaying their insurance license and credentials
- The verified profile is directly linked in the lead funnel
- Agents are featured on the same marketing website where leads discover them
- Builds instant credibility and professional trust with prospects

### 3. Real-Time Command Center
- Live dashboard showing revenue, lead flow, campaign performance, and ROI in real time
- Full CRM for lead and client pipeline management
- 100% transparency — agents see exactly what is spent on their campaigns and what goes toward management
- No hidden markups or surprise fees

### 4. Elite IUL Sales Training
- Full sales strategy course focused specifically on selling IUL insurance
- Adam Taylor and Harlan Ryker — trained directly by Jeremy Miner, creator of the NEPQ (Neuro-Emotional Persuasion Questioning) sales methodology — teaching high-ticket IUL sales strategies
- David Fisher — $1.2 million in commissions issued and paid in a single year — sharing his complete IUL and annuity sales process inside the platform
- Additional trainers and courses available
- Training is built into the platform, not a separate product

### 5. AI-Powered Tools
- Artificial intelligence deeply integrated throughout the system
- Recruiting and downline building systems to scale your organization

### 6. Dedicated Support
- American customer success manager assigned to each agent
- Live response within 5 minutes
- Not a chatbot — a real person who knows your account

### 7. Profit Sharing
- Agents earn 10% of the profit Alpha Agent makes from agents they refer to the platform
- Aligned incentives — Alpha Agent succeeds when agents succeed

### 8. Top Producer Network
- Access to a community of top-producing IUL agents
- Split cases with experienced agents to learn and grow
- Cross-team collaboration — connect with elite producers even outside your organization
- Mentorship and peer support built into the platform

## How Alpha Agent Compares

Alpha Agent is fundamentally different from traditional insurance lead providers:

- **Aged Lead Store, Badass Insurance Leads** ($1-$15/lead): Sell aged contact data in spreadsheets. Agents cold-call names that may have been sold to multiple other agents. No appointments, no CRM, no training, no territory protection.

- **Agent Advantage, G.O.A.T. Leads** ($23-$50/lead): Sell fresh exclusive contact info. Agents still do all outreach, follow-up, and appointment setting themselves. No system, no training, no support.

- **Jucebox** ($5,000-$11,000 upfront): Closest to Alpha Agent's model — offers coaching + leads + CRM. But requires large upfront payment, no territory protection mentioned, prospects self-book (not branded appointments), and no NFIA verification.

- **Skyline Social** ($5,000-$8,000 one-time): Builds your marketing funnel and hands it over. Agent must manage their own ads going forward. One-time setup, not ongoing management.

- **Alpha Agent** (management cost + ad spend): The complete operating system. Exclusive leads from proprietary ad accounts, branded funnels, NFIA-verified profiles, command center, CRM, elite sales training, AI tools, dedicated American CSM, profit sharing, and top producer network — all with 100% transparency.

## Key Performance Stats
- 520+ active insurance agents on the platform
- 15-30 exclusive branded appointments per month per agent
- 80%+ show rate on appointments
- Average target premium: $4,571 per application
- 15-25% submit rate on applications
- Millions of dollars in tracked IUL-specific Google Ads spend
- 5-minute average response time from dedicated American success managers

## Who Alpha Agent Serves

Alpha Agent serves licensed life insurance agents in the United States who sell Indexed Universal Life (IUL) insurance and want a complete operating system to scale their business. The platform is designed for professionals who want to master their craft with the best tools, training, leads, and support in the industry — not agents looking for cheap shared leads to cold-call.
